<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-ê]][[de:Erde-Schaf]][[hak:Kí-vi]][[ja:己未]][[ko:기미]][[vi:Kỷ Mùi]][[za:Geijmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-bī]][[zh-yue:己未]][[zh:己未]]

'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 56th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Earth Horse]] and followed by [[Kōshin|Yang Metal Monkey]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[wèi|Goat (未)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], forming a harmonious relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]]).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Years of Yin Earth Goat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 59 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Earth Goat]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Earth Goat (己未)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 59|59 AD]]
* [[AD 119|119 AD]]
* [[179|179 AD]]
* [[239|239 AD]]
* [[299|299 AD]]
* [[359|359 AD]]
* [[419|419 AD]]
* [[479|479 AD]]
* [[539|539 AD]]
* [[599|599 AD]]
* [[659|659 AD]]
* [[719|719 AD]]
* [[779|779 AD]]
* [[839|839 AD]]
* [[899|899 AD]]
* [[959|959 AD]]
|
* [[1019|1019 AD]]
* [[1079|1079 AD]]
* [[1139|1139 AD]]
* [[1199|1199 AD]]
* [[1259|1259 AD]]
* [[1319|1319 AD]]
* [[1379|1379 AD]]
* [[1439|1439 AD]]
* [[1499|1499 AD]]
* [[1559|1559 AD]]
* [[1619|1619 AD]]
* [[1679|1679 AD]]
* [[1739|1739 AD]]
* [[1799|1799 AD]]
* [[1859|1859 AD]]
* [[1919|1919 AD]]
* [[1979|1979 AD]]
|
* [[2039 AD]]
* [[2090s|2099 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2159 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2219 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2279 AD]]
* [[2339 AD]]
* [[2399 AD]]
* [[2459 AD]]
* [[2519 AD]]
* [[2579 AD]]
* [[2639 AD]]
* [[2699 AD]]
* [[2759 AD]]
* [[2819 AD]]
* [[2879 AD]]
* [[2939 AD]]
* [[3rd millennium|2999 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the month of [[June]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Earth Goat]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Xiaoshu|Minor Heat]] until the day before [[Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Earth Goat]] is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of [[Yin Earth Goat]] is the 5th day of [[Hassen]] (excluding gap days).
==See Also==
{{wikidata link|Q904801}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
